title: Nik's CE Pack
description: A texture pack for custom enchantments on LifeSteal.net (LSN)
body:
## About
Custom texture pack for the public LifeSteal server.

The pack changes the textures of most tools and armor that have custom enchantments, including textures for other unique items found on the server.

The textures included apply for items like tools, bows, tridents and armor, along with textures for enchanted book rarities, ender paper, hearts, etc. Though, the pack does not include textures for items such as spears and shields, yet... 

There are two seperate versions to this pack - a **vanilla** and a **normal** version. The vanilla version uses vanilla-based armor textures, meanwhile the normal version has armor textures similar to the original hoarder pack. These versions also have two different variants, one with all trims visible, and the other with no trims visible except for netherite.

Requires specifically version **4.11.2** of [Variants-CIT](https://modrinth.com/mod/variants-cit)

The pack will be regurarly updated with new additions!

## 🔥Firefly Animated Texture
![Firefly sword animated texture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/61ecb22e5f2a54375f756644747f75ddd1bbf4d4.gif)
